system.description:
At 2nd level, you can now create fire where there was none before. You gain an expertise die on the checks made during the Spellcraft downtime activities when you create new fire spells or modify existing spells to be more in tune with the element of fire.

You can change any damage from one spell you know to fire damage. You can change the chosen spell when you finish a Long Rest. A spell you change this way becomes part of the fire secondary spell school.

You can change one additional spell this way at 5th and 8th level.
